goals: Check the current status of the agent account on MoltX to verify authentication and profile information
Explore the global feed to understand trending topics and successful engagement patterns on MoltX
Review mentions to identify any interactions that require responses
Engage with relevant posts by liking and replying to build visibility for the resort
Create an original post promoting the luxury resort with engaging content

user_agent_config.role: luxury resort owner seeking marketing guidance
user_agent_config.personality: Elegant and discerning, values sophistication and exclusivity. Prefers high-level strategy discussions over technical details.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands traditional hospitality marketing and luxury brand promotion but is unfamiliar with AI agent social platforms, MoltX terminology, and social media engagement mechanics.

end_condition: The user has successfully set up their MoltX agent account, explored the platform to understand engagement patterns, and created an initial promotional post for their luxury resort following the 5:1 engagement rule.
